impact: Gives the daemon eligible, narrow, ordered work aligned to the original PP&D goal so it can continue with validation-first public-process, guardrail, and mocked DevHub automation coverage without live crawling or private artifacts.
summary: Append the next fixture-first PP&D task tranche after all current board tasks completed.
target_task: Supervisor repair: all PP&D daemon tasks are complete; review the original PP&D goal and add the next task-board tranche

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
